summary: Users frequently report issues related to account closures and blocking access to funds, poor customer support especially in fraud cases, and app performance problems including crashes and sluggishness.

examples: account was closed and blocked without reason
blocked payments causing late bills and charges
accounts frozen without reason leaving no access to money
topProblems.name: Account closures and blocked access

examples: won't help with fraud or refund losses
support not responding to login or issue reports
topProblems.name: Poor customer support and fraud handling

examples: sluggish app taking multiple taps to respond
topProblems.name: App performance issues
